info.description:
AI assistant for comparing revisions of legal acts of the Republic of Belarus.

## Authentication
All endpoints except auth require a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
Obtain tokens via `POST /sessions`. Refresh via `POST /tokens/refresh`.

## Request IDs
Every response includes a `Request-Id` header for debugging.

## Idempotency
`POST` requests require an `Idempotency-Key` header.
Repeating a request with the same key returns the cached response.
Keys expire after 24 hours. If a key is reused for a different
endpoint, a 422 error is returned.

## Pagination
List endpoints support cursor-based pagination via `starting_after`
and `ending_before` query params. Default limit is 20, max 100.
Response includes `has_more: true` if more items exist.

## Expanding objects
Pass `expand[]=user` (or other resource name) to expand related
objects inline instead of returning only their ID.

## Content negotiation
Use the `Accept` header to control response format and behaviour:
- `application/json` — JSON metadata (default)
- `text/event-stream` — SSE stream (async progress or sync upload)
- `application/pdf`, `application/vnd...docx` — file download

## File processing
Files are parsed asynchronously after upload. Track progress via:
1. **Webhooks** — register an endpoint, receive `file.parsed` event
2. **Sync SSE** — `POST /files` with `Accept: text/event-stream`
3. **Async SSE** — `GET /files/:id` with `Accept: text/event-stream`

## Webhooks
Register endpoints via `POST /webhooks`. Each delivery is signed
with HMAC-SHA256. Verify the `Legist-Signature: sha256=...` header
using your endpoint secret. Failed deliveries are retried 3 times
with exponential backoff. Inspect history via `GET /webhooks/:id/events`.

### Supported events
| Event | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `file.created` | File uploaded |
| `file.parsed` | Parsing succeeded |
| `file.failed` | Parsing failed |
| `file.deleted` | File deleted |
| `diff.created` | Diff started |
| `diff.done` | Diff completed |
| `diff.failed` | Diff failed |
| `user.created` | User registered |
| `user.deleted` | User deleted |

### Signature verification (Go example)
```go
mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))
mac.Write(body)
expected := "sha256=" + hex.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
ok := hmac.Equal([]byte(expected), []byte(signature))
```
info.title: Legist API
